---
title: "SQLREPL Minimal"
format: html
execute:
  enabled: false
filters:
- sqlrepl/_extensions/sqlrepl/sqlrepl.lua
---


```{.sqlrepl lifecycle="beforeAll" group="demo1"}
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS demotable;
CREATE TABLE demotable (id INT, name TEXT);
```

```{.sqlrepl lifecycle="beforeEach" group="demo1"}
DELETE FROM demotable;
INSERT INTO demotable VALUES (1, 'Alice');
```

```{.sqlrepl lifecycle="main" group="demo1"}
SELECT * FROM demotable;
```
